diagrams.title: ICT Evolution Timeline
diagrams.description: Timeline showing major milestones in ICT development from 1945 to present
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the chronological advancement of ICT and key technological breakthroughs that shaped modern computing

diagrams.title: ICT Environmental Impact Cycle
diagrams.description: Flow diagram showing the environmental impact throughout ICT lifecycle
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how ICT contributes to environmental problems at each stage and identifying intervention points for sustainability

diagrams.title: Green Computing Framework
diagrams.description: Framework showing strategies for sustainable IT implementation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding practical approaches to reduce ICT's environmental footprint
